debian.notes: slim-bullseye is the minimal Debian 11 variant shipped with the official Ruby Docker image

openssl.debian_bullseye_package: openssl 1.1.1n (or later 1.1.1 patch shipped with Bullseye updates)
openssl.notes: OpenSSL 1.1.1 is the version bundled with Debian Bullseye; exact patch level depends on when the Docker image was pulled
